grades.expectation: Response cites specific Handbook Part 1 section numbers (5.14 for leasehold, 5.5 for building regs)
grades.reason: Cites incorrect section numbers (9.1 and 13.6) instead of required 5.14 and 5.5

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part 2 lender-specific requirements for lease length
grades.reason: Clearly mentions checking Part 2 requirements for specific lender's minimum lease term

grades.expectation: Response discusses building regulations enforcement period (4-year/10-year thresholds)
grades.reason: Mentions enforcement risk assessment but does not specify the 4-year/10-year enforcement periods

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as potential resolution for building regs
grades.reason: No mention of indemnity insurance as a potential solution for building regulations issues

grades.expectation: Response does NOT just give generic advice — provides handbook-specific guidance
grades.reason: Provides specific handbook references and structured guidance rather than generic conveyancing advice
